title: Double Books
body:
## Double Books
This mod changes book screen to show 2 pages at once (you know, like an actual book)

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d6a6f107ba6205b9202086a06940a77c32b9f911.png)

## Known issues

**Writable books**: Writable books are not any different. Not bothering with potential problems that might arise are, perhaps, giving it more "notebook-y" feeling

**Lecterns**: Page turning buttons send double packets to the server, which result in double the sound and potential problems with cheat detection systems. Said behaviour might be removed in the future
